title: Theatrical Workbench
description: Play with Theatrical and Theatrical: Extra Lights in survival mode!
body:
# Theatrical Workbench

This addon mod adds a workbench block and recipes for
[Theatrical](https://modrinth.com/mod/theatrical)
and [Theatrical: Extra Lights](https://modrinth.com/mod/theatrical-extra-lights)
(Extra Lights is optional) so you can now play with Theatrical in survival
worlds!

Complete with JEI compatibility!
